title: CatoDrive - Premium Car Rentals, Dallas/Fort Worth

seo_description: 75+ premium vehicles delivered to DFW Airport, Love Field, hotels, or anywhere in Dallas/Fort Worth. From $79/day with white-glove service.

branding.name: CATODRIVE
branding.description: Airport Mobility & P2P Fleet Management — Dallas/Fort Worth

props.title: Airport Mobility is Trapped in 1995.
props.subtitle: Every rental company makes you take a shuttle bus to a satellite lot. CatoDrive delivers your car curbside at the terminal. DFW and Love Field. Keys in hand.

props.heading: Proven Traction. Zero Outside Capital.
props.subheading: Real numbers from a real fleet. 100% bootstrapped.

props.title: Premium Experience for Travelers. Passive Income for Owners.
props.description: CatoDrive built what Enterprise, Hertz, and Avis never would — actual terminal delivery at both DFW airports. And we turned it into a passive income engine for vehicle owners.

benefits.title: Free Terminal Valet
benefits.description: Car delivered straight to your terminal at DFW International and Love Field. Returned the same way. No shuttles. No satellite lots. Ever.

benefits.title: Exact Car, Guaranteed
benefits.description: Book the precise vehicle you want. Real photos, real car. No bait-and-switch. Every vehicle SOP-maintained, spotless, and road-ready.

benefits.title: Owners Net $1,066–$1,878/mo
benefits.description: 80% of every booking goes to you. After maintenance costs (~$100–200/mo), the average owner nets over $1,000/month per vehicle. Vehicle pays for itself in 36–40 months.

benefits.title: Full Fleet Management
benefits.description: Owners do nothing. We list, price, deliver, clean, and service. 24/7 operations team based in DFW. Your only job is cashing the check.

props.label: How It Works
props.heading: Five Steps. Zero Headaches. Income in 30 Days.
props.subheading: From vehicle to passive income — CatoDrive handles 100% of operations from list to payout.

steps.title: Finance Your Car
steps.description: Purchase or finance a vehicle through our Hendrick VW partnership or your own source. We help you select the highest-demand model for DFW airport routes.

steps.title: CatoDrive Lists It
steps.description: We photograph, list, price dynamically, and manage your car. You do nothing.

steps.title: Guest Books Online
steps.description: A vetted traveler books online. CatoDrive screens every trip. You're never involved.

steps.title: We Manage Everything
steps.description: Valet pickup, terminal delivery, cleaning, maintenance coordination. Full white-glove service.

steps.title: You Get Paid
steps.description: 80% of every booking hits your account monthly. No invoices. No chasing.

props.heading: Don't Take Our Word For It
props.subheading: 4.96 stars across 2,053 verified reviews. Here's what our partners say.

testimonials.name: Portfolio Owner
testimonials.text: I was skeptical at first — I'd never rented my car before. CatoDrive listed it, handled every guest, and I made $1,400 my first month. I financed a second car within 90 days. Now I have six cars on the platform.

testimonials.name: Asset Partner
testimonials.text: The car wash alone would've been a headache. CatoDrive handles it all. My only job is cashing the check.

testimonials.name: DFW Investor
testimonials.text: They told me 18-month payback. I hit breakeven in 14. The airport market is insane right now.

props.title: Two Sides of the Platform
props.subtitle: Travel without hassle. Earn without effort.

props.title: Every Risk Has an Owner. Most of Them Are Us.

props.title: Frequently Asked Questions
props.subtitle: Everything you need to know about CatoDrive.

items.question: What is CatoDrive?
items.answer: CatoDrive is a locally-operated, peer-to-peer fleet management platform in Dallas/Fort Worth. We connect vehicle owners (asset partners) with travelers who need premium airport mobility. 72 vehicles under management, $307K in 2025 revenue, 4.96-star rating across 2,053 reviews. 100% bootstrapped.

items.question: How much can I earn as an asset partner?
items.answer: Average daily rate: $65–$120. Utilization: 22–26 days/month. After CatoDrive's 20% commission and your maintenance costs (~$100–200/month), owners net $1,066–$1,878/month per vehicle. Vehicle pays for itself in 36–40 months — then it's pure profit.

items.question: What vehicles perform best?
items.answer: Top 2025 performers: VW Atlas ($1,400–$1,600/mo avg), VW Tiguan ($1,200–$1,400/mo avg), Kia Sportage ($1,000–$1,200/mo avg), Jeep Grand Cherokee ($1,400–$1,600/mo avg). AWD SUVs with 5–7 seats perform best at DFW.

items.question: What about insurance?
items.answer: $750,000 liability + collision coverage on every trip via commercial auto insurance. Owner never files a claim directly. Off-trip coverage under CatoDrive umbrella. Your only insurance responsibility is personal coverage when you personally drive.

items.question: What does CatoDrive charge?
items.answer: 20% commission on every booking. That covers listing, pricing, valet pickup/delivery, cleaning, maintenance coordination, guest screening, 24/7 support, and monthly payouts. Owner keeps 80%.

items.question: How do I get started?
items.answer: Finance a vehicle through our Hendrick VW partnership or bring your own (2013+, clean title, under 100K miles). We photograph, list, and manage everything. First payout within 30 days.

items.question: What makes CatoDrive different?
items.answer: Terminal delivery. We are the only platform in DFW delivering vehicles curbside at both DFW International and Love Field. No shuttle buses. Plus full SOP fleet management — owners do literally nothing except collect monthly deposits.

items.question: What areas do you serve?
items.answer: The entire DFW metroplex: DFW Airport, Love Field, Downtown Dallas, Uptown, Fort Worth, Arlington, Plano, Frisco, McKinney, and surrounding areas.
